```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Kern County produces 72 percent of California’s oil and 70 percent of its natural gas.",
    "The oil industry fosters stability and economic growth within Kern County communities.",
    "The oil industry provides high-wage jobs to individuals with varied educational backgrounds, including those without a college degree.",
    "Chevron has contributed nearly $9 million to community partners and local nonprofit organizations since 2016.",
    "California’s oil production has dropped 50 percent since 1985, while reliance on foreign oil has increased 12-fold.",
    "California oil companies conduct their work in the safest and most environmentally responsible manner compared to foreign oil producers.",
    "The recent oil seepage discovered by Chevron involved a mixture of 30 percent oil and 70 percent unusable brackish water.",
    "The area affected by the oil seepage is less than one acre, equivalent to approximately 20 swimming pools in a 500-acre oil field.",
    "There has been no observed impact to wildlife from the recent oil seepage incident."
  ]
}
```
